title: angraecopsis leedalii
intro: Angraecopsis leedalii is a species of orchid native to the tropical rainforests of the Democratic Republic of Congo. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Angraecopsis leedalii are said to include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used to extract its medicinal compounds.
